utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with all details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists physical (LifeFirst Standard Plan €100/month) and mental (LifeFirst Standard Plan €65/month). Costs are present. The extra sports_activity is not required but does not harm completeness. This item is fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists home_contents (LifeFirst Standard Coverage €60/month). Cost is present. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan lists standard (LifeFirst Standard Plan €50/month). Cost is present. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists two enhancements with costs (€40/month, €75/month). Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan includes monthly_cost (€470/month) and annual_cost (€5640/year). Fully specified.
All required items are present and specified with costs.
